name: Kourabiedes
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Mix together the butter, granulated sugar, egg yolks, and vanilla extract until well combined. In a separate bowl, blend the flour, baking powder, and ground cloves. Stir these into the butter mixture until fully incorporated. Form the dough into small balls about 3/4-inch in diameter or into cylindrical shapes that are 2 inches long and half-moon shaped. Place the cookies on a lightly greased baking sheet. Bake for 10-12 minutes, then allow to cool for 2 minutes before removing from the sheet. Once cooled, dust with powdered sugar. For an authentic Greek version, omit the ground cloves and place a whole clove in the center of each cookie before baking.
